title: 宝塚記念の後に・鼓動と輝き

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The head-to-head between the Otherworldly
Front-Runner and the Empress has been settled!
Silence Suzuka is victorious!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove put up quite a fight, but Suzuka just
wouldn't give up the lead!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: You're right! I couldn't keep my eyes off her!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Argh! How disgraceful...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What kind of an empress can't even surpass a
single "ideal"?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: No, I can't waste time sulking like this.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka! Once I become worthy of the name
"Empress," I'm coming back for you!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And when that time comes, I will be challenging
you once again!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She meets Air Groove's determined gaze and
nods in solemn agreement.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove and Silence Suzuka shake hands,
sealing their promise to challenge each other
once more.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I'll forget what happened today for a
long while...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I could hear Air Groove's heartbeat while we were
racing.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And I could feel her passion burning right beside
me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That's precisely why I couldn't give up my lead to
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka's eyes shine as if the passion that
burned inside the Empress has spread, and
smolders within her.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I want to become even faster.
choice_data_list: We've got summer camp to get through first.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: That's right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few hours later, the worked-up Umamusume are
returning to their dorms.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Por quuuuué?! I can't believe it! SUZUKAAA!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El, it's late. Keep your voice down, okay?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Right! Sorry!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But... we were just in the stands watchin' the race! Why do I feel like I was the one who lost?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It makes me think there's no way I can beat her!
This sucks! This sucks, this sucks, this sucks, this
sucks!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
How can I ever become the world's strongest
racer now?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Gaaah! You've got this, El! Fight! FIGHT! Run!
Run! ÁNDALE!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa dashes away yelling into the
night, leaving a concerned Grass Wonder in a
cloud of dust.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Sigh. El, you really need to keep it down.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
She really took off like the wind, though, didn't
she?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the curtains open on a new challenge.
